original_image_tags: Seal of the Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation

elements.description: A circular FBI seal in the top left corner. A red stamp at the bottom right reads 'ALL INFORMATION CONTAINED HEREIN IS UNCLASSIFIED' with empty fields for 'DATE' and 'BY'. A red 'COPIES DESTROYED' stamp with a date is at the bottom left. Handwritten blue text '62-83894-419' and a red 'ENCLOSURE' stamp are at the bottom center. Two dark circular punch holes are at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the presence of the FBI seal in the top left corner, but Description B adds numerous specific visual elements (stamps, handwritten text, punch holes) that Description A omits without contradiction.
